scripts.verify: pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.build:assets: cp manifest.firefox.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/dashboard/dashboard.html dist/
scripts.build: pnpm run build:content && pnpm run build:background && pnpm run build:dashboard && pnpm run build:assets
scripts.package:local: pnpm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../aozora-history-local.xpi .
